languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

languages.text: "Вам не стоит недооценивать мудрость старого друга и опытного коллеги, госпожа Хейдари. Продолжительные исследования показывают, что наличие подобных лиц рядом бывает жизненно необходимо".
"You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."
languages.original_text: "Вам не стоит недооценивать мудрость старого друга и опытного коллеги, госпожа Хейдари. Продолжительные исследования показывают, что наличие подобных лиц рядом бывает жизненно необходимо".

traits.locale_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."
"You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."
"You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

languages.text: 「ヘイダリーさんのような、古い友人であり経験豊富な同僚の知恵を軽視すべきではありません。広範囲な研究は、そのような人物の存在が非常に重要であることを示しています」
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

traits.locale_text: 「ヘイダリー女史のような、古い友人であり経験豊富な同僚の知恵を軽視すべきではありません。広範囲な研究は、そのような人物の存在が非常に重要であることを示しています。」

languages.text: « Vous ne devriez pas sous-estimer la sagesse d'un vieil ami doublé d'un collègue expérimenté, maîtresse Heydari. Des études approfondies montrent que la présence de tels individus peut être d'une importance capitale. »
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne devriez pas sous-estimer la sagesse d'un vieil ami doublé d'un collègue expérimenté, maîtresse Heydari. Des études approfondies montrent que la présence de tels individus peut être d'une importance capitale. »

languages.text: "Ihr solltet die Weisheit eines alten Freundes und erfahrenen Kollegen nicht unterschätzen, Herrin Heydari. Umfassende Studien haben gezeigt, dass die Gegenwart solcher Individuen sehr wichtig sein kann."
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr solltet die Weisheit eines alten Freundes und erfahrenen Kollegen nicht unterschätzen, Herrin Heydari. Umfassende Studien haben gezeigt, dass die Gegenwart solcher Individuen sehr wichtig sein kann."

languages.text: "Eski bir dostun ve deneyimli bir meslektaşın bilgeliğini küçümsememelisiniz Üstat Heydari. Kapsamlı çalışmalar, bu tür bireylerin varlığının hayati önem taşıyabileceğini göstermektedir."
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

traits.locale_text: "Eski bir dostun ve deneyimli bir meslektaşın bilgeliğini küçümsememelisiniz Üstat Heydari. Kapsamlı çalışmalar, bu tür bireylerin varlığının hayati önem taşıyabileceğini göstermektedir."

languages.text: «No debería subestimar la sabiduría de un viejo y experimentado colega y amigo, señora Heydari. Numerosos estudios demuestran que la presencia de tales individuos puede ser de vital importancia».
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."

traits.locale_text: «No debería subestimar la sabiduría de un viejo y experimentado colega y amigo, señora Heydari. Numerosos estudios demuestran que la presencia de tales individuos puede ser de vital importancia».

languages.text: “您不该小看一位老朋友兼资深同事的智慧，海达利女士。大量研究证明，这类人物的存在往往能发挥至关重要的作用。”
languages.original_text: "You should not underestimate the wisdom of an old friend and experienced colleague, Mistress Heydari. Extensive studies show that the presence of such individuals can be vitally important."
